parameters.query:
INSERT INTO vm_machines (ip, data, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.ip }}', '{{ $json.data }}', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  data = VALUES(data),
  updated_at = NOW();
